text:
Debug (, rom. Debaggu) is a card exclusive to the physical Greed Island card set.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows one of the G.I. Game Masters to forcefully activate any event that occurs on Greed Island.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.-000 :: 
任意のイベントのフラグを強制的にオンにする
|-
![Eng]
|No.-000 :: Debug 
Activate any event flag by force.
|}

Greed Island Highest Selection Set

 
Greed Island Highest Selection Set Ruler Only Card Promo.png|Debug is the mystery card in the Ruler Only set
